title: croton betulinus
intro: Croton betulinus, also known as the white croton, is a plant species native to tropical Africa and Asia, characterized by its bright green leaves and small white or yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Croton betulinus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
